description_long: This refrigerator features a tall, rectangular form with a flat top and smooth, metallic gray surfaces. The front face is equipped with four evenly spaced horizontal shelves inside a recessed compartment, suggesting an open or glassless door design. To the right of the shelves, a small control panel with a grid of buttons is visible, indicating electronic controls. Below the shelving area, there is a wide horizontal drawer, likely for additional storage. The sides and back are plain, with no visible handles, vents, or decorative elements. The overall appearance is utilitarian and modern, suitable for urban or commercial environments.
description: A tall, metallic gray refrigerator with open shelving, a control panel, and a lower drawer, featuring a modern, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing open shelving, a control panel on the right, and a wide lower drawer.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, featureless metallic surface.
description_view_2: Rear view with a smooth, unadorned metallic panel.
description_view_3: Right side view, also plain and featureless, matching the left side.
attribute_door_handle_style: integrated, recessed into the lower edge of the door, not protruding
